title: Visual Recipe Editor
body:
Tired of writing KubeJS scripts by hand? Then this mod is for you!

# How to use

> 1.  To open the main GUI, type `/visualrecipeeditor maingui or /vre maingui`
> 2.  To select a recipe click the file icon, type in the file's name and extension, select directory (server/client/startup, server most of the time) and click "confirm"
> 3.  To add a recipe, click "add" button and select the recipe type (only 3x3 and 2x2 crafting grid **for now**).
> 4.  Fill the grid and the output slot with your ingredients and click "generate"
> 5.  That's it, your file is in chosen directory and ready to be loaded with KubeJS

# Current Features

1.  3x3 and 2x2 crafting table recipe generator
2.  Tag support
3.  File Selector
4.  Multiple recipes in one file
5.  Create: mechanical crafter (1.2.0 +)
6.  Recipe removing by ID (1.3.0 +)

# Planned Features

1.  More modded recipes support
2.  More recipe removing methods
3.  Tooltips
4.  Other vannila recipes support

 

Found a bug? Report it here: [https://discord.gg/VwUw5fTCTA](https://discord.gg/VwUw5fTCTA)

Inspired by [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/recipe-generator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/recipe-generator)

_Note: this mod is not meant to replace the recipe generator, it's a free time project for me to see how far can I go with generating files with a GUI_

_Last updated 11.4.2026_
